modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Slow performance of SQL queries after Oracle client update to 19c

full_description_text:  
I recently updated my Oracle client from 12g to 19c.  
Now, the SQL queries I run through my ODBC connection are much slower.  
This issue is noticeable compared to my previous computer's performance.
short_description: Slow performance of SQL queries after Oracle client update to 19c
description:
